// room script file

#sectionstart room_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function room_a (){
  // script for room: Player enters screen (before fadein)
  SetObjectClickable (0, 0);
  SetObjectClickable (1, 0);
  SetObjectClickable (12, 0);
  SetObjectClickable (13, 0);
  SetMusicVolume (2);
  SetMusicRepeat (1);

if (GetGlobalInt(19)==0) {  
  if (GetGlobalInt (50) == 0) PlayMusic (13);
  else if (GetGlobalInt (50) == 3) 
  {
    if (GetGlobalInt (23) == 1) PlayMusic (4);
    else if (GetGlobalInt (23) == 2) PlayAmbientSound (1, 70, 150, 50, 50);
    else if (GetGlobalInt (23) == 3) PlayMusic (2);
  }
  else if (GetGlobalInt (50) == 4) PlayMusic (3);
}
  init_object (109, 0);
  init_object (110, 1);
  AlarmSound ();

  if (GetGlobalInt (19) ==2)
  {
    ObjectOn(0);
    SetObjectGraphic (5, 437);
    character [SANDY].room = 4;
    ReleaseCharacterView(DAVE);
    PlaceCharacter (SANDY, 204, 126, DIR_UP);
    PlaceCharacter (DAVE, 60, 136, DIR_RIGHT);
  }
}
#sectionend room_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot1_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot1_a (){
  // script for hotspot1: Any click on hotspot
  if (any_click_on_door (109, 0, 60, 136, DIR_LEFT, 3, 575, 136, DIR_LEFT) == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot1_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot2_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot2_a (){
  // script for hotspot2: Any click on hotspot
  if (any_click_on_door (110, 1, 570, 136, DIR_RIGHT, 5, 70, 127, DIR_RIGHT) == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot2_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot3_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot3_a (){
  // script for hotspot3: Any click on hotspot
  SetWalkTo (131, 135, DIR_UP);
  if (WalkedToLookedAt ("It sure is old.") != 0) { }
  else if (UsedAction (A_OPEN))
  {
    if (MovedTo ())
    {
      DisableHotspot (3);
      PlaySound (1);
      ObjectOn (2);
      if (GetGlobalInt (18) == 0) ObjectOn (3);
    }
  }
  else Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot3_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot4_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot4_a (){
  // script for hotspot4: Any click on hotspot
  SetWalkTo (131, 135, DIR_UP);
  if (WalkedToLookedAt ("") != 0) { }
  else if (UsedAction (A_OPEN))
  {
    if (MovedTo ())
    {
      DisableHotspot (4);
      PlaySound (1);
      ObjectOn (4);
      ObjectOn (5);
      if ((GetGlobalInt (50) == 1) || (GetGlobalInt (50) == 3)) ObjectOn (6);
      else if ((GetGlobalInt (50) == 2) || (GetGlobalInt (50) == 4)) ObjectOn (7);
    }
  }
  else Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot4_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart object4_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function object4_a (){
  // script for object4: Any click on object
  SetWalkTo (131, 135, DIR_UP);
  if (WalkedToLookedAt ("") != 0) { }
  else if (UsedAction (A_CLOSE))
  {
    if (MovedTo ())
    {
      EnableHotspot (4);
      PlaySound (5);
      ObjectOff (4);
      ObjectOff (5);
      ObjectOff (6);
      ObjectOff (7);
    }
  }
  else Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend object4_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart object2_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function object2_a (){
  // script for object2: Any click on object
  SetWalkTo (131, 135, DIR_UP);
  if (WalkedToLookedAt ("It sure is old.") != 0) { }
  else if (UsedAction (A_CLOSE))
  {
    if (MovedTo ())
    {
      EnableHotspot (3);
      PlaySound (1);
      ObjectOff (2);
      ObjectOff (3);
    }
  }
  else
  {
    int result = UsedInvItem (37);
    if (result == 2)
    {
      ObjectOn (3);
      PlaySound (66);
      LoseInventory (37);
      SetGlobalInt (18, 0);
    }
    else if (result == 0) Unhandled ();
  }
}
#sectionend object2_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart object11_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function object11_a (){
  // script for object11: Any click on object
  if (any_click_walk_look_pick (360, 134, DIR_DOWN, "", 11, 5, -1, 4) == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend object11_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot5_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot5_a (){
  // script for hotspot5: Any click on hotspot
  SetWalkTo (205, 135, DIR_UP);
  if (WalkedToLookedAt ("") != 0) { }
  else if (UsedAction (A_LOOK_AT))
  {
    if (MovedTo ())
    {
      if (GetGlobalInt (253) == 0) DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "It's dark outside.");
      else                         DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "It's broken from the noise.");
    }
  }
  else Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot5_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot6_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot6_a (){
  // script for hotspot6: Any click on hotspot
  SetWalkTo (420, 135, DIR_UP);
  if (WalkedToLookedAt ("") != 0) { }
  else if (UsedAction (A_LOOK_AT))
  {
    if (MovedTo ())
    {
      if (GetGlobalInt (253) == 0) DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "It's dark outside.");
      else                         DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "It's broken from the noise.");
    }
  }
  else Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot6_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot7_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot7_a (){
  // script for hotspot7: Any click on hotspot
  if (any_click_walk_look (315, 135, DIR_UP, "Cozy.") == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot7_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart object8_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function object8_a (){
  // script for object8: Any click on object
  if (any_click_walk_look (315, 135, DIR_UP, "It looks expensive.") == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend object8_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot8_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot8_b (){
  // script for hotspot8: Any click on hotspot
  if (any_click_walk_look (505, 135, DIR_UP, "That's castle Brunwald.") == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot8_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart object3_c  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function object3_c (){
  // script for object3: Any click on object
  SetWalkTo (131, 135, DIR_UP);
  if (WalkedToLookedAt ("") != 0) { }
  else if (UsedAction (A_PICK_UP))
  {
    if (MovedTo ())
    {
      if (GetPlayerCharacter () == BERNHARD)
      {
        PlaySound (4);
        ObjectOff (3);
        AddInventory (37);
        SetGlobalInt (18, 1);
      }
      else DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "I don't know how this stuff works!");
    }
  }
  else if (UsedAction (A_LOOK_AT))
  {
    if (MovedTo ())
    {
      if (GetPlayerCharacter () == BERNHARD) DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "These things will work with anything.");
      else                                   DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "This looks pretty technical.");
    }
  }
  else Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend object3_c  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart object5_d  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function object5_d (){
  // script for object5: Any click on object
  SetWalkTo (131, 135, DIR_UP);
  if (WalkedToLookedAt ("Nice! Looks like it can only play tapes, though.") != 0) {  }
  else if (UsedAction (A_USE))
  {
    if (MovedTo ())
    {
      if (GetGlobalInt (50) == 0) DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "There's no tape in the player.");
      else
      {
        if (GetGlobalInt (199) == 0) DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "The power is off.");
        else
        {
          // play tape
          PlaySound (94);
          if (GetGlobalInt (50) == 1)
          {
            SetGlobalInt (50, 3);
            SetObjectGraphic (5, 437);
            // silence
            if (GetGlobalInt (23) == 0) DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "It's blank.");
            // old record
            else if (GetGlobalInt (23) == 1) PlayMusic (4);
            // record
            else if (GetGlobalInt (23) == 2)
            {
              StopMusic ();
              Wait (5);
              PlayAmbientSound (1, 70, 150, 50, 50);
              if (GetGlobalInt (253) == 0)
              {
                // glass is breaking
                Wait (60);
                PlaySound (59);
                ObjectOn (13);
                Wait (60);
                PlaySound (58);
                ObjectOn (12);
                Wait (60);
                PlaySound (69);
                SetObjectGraphic (8, 459);
                ObjectOff (9);
                ObjectOn (10);
                ObjectOn (11);
                SetGlobalInt (253, 1);
              }
            }
            // Syd or Razor
            else if (GetGlobalInt (23) == 3) PlayMusic (2);
          }
          else if (GetGlobalInt (50) == 3)
          {
            SetGlobalInt (50, 1);
            SetObjectGraphic (5, 435);
            StopAmbientSound (1);
            PlayMusic (13);
          }
          else if (GetGlobalInt (50) == 2)
          {
            SetGlobalInt (50, 4);
            SetObjectGraphic (5, 437);
            PlayMusic (3);
          }
          else if (GetGlobalInt (50) == 4)
          {
            SetGlobalInt (50, 2);
            SetObjectGraphic (5, 435);
            PlayMusic (13);
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  else
  {
    int result = UsedInvItem (14);
    if (result == 2)
    {
      if (MovedTo ())
      {
        if (GetGlobalInt (199) == 0) DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "The power is off.");
        else if (GetGlobalInt (50) == 0) 
        {
          PlaySound (60);
          ObjectOn (6);
          LoseInventory (14);
          SetGlobalInt (50, 1);
        }
        else DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "It's not empty.");
      }
    }
    if (result != 0) return 0;
    result = UsedInvItem (26);
    if (result == 2)
    {
      if (MovedTo ())
      {
        if (GetGlobalInt (199) == 0) DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "The power is off.");
        else if (GetGlobalInt (50) == 0) 
        {
          PlaySound (60);
          ObjectOn (7);
          LoseInventory (26);
          SetGlobalInt (50, 2);
        }
        else DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "It's not empty.");
      }
    }
    if (result != 0) return 0;
    Unhandled ();
  }
}
#sectionend object5_d  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


function AnyClickOntoCassette (int object, int item){
  SetWalkTo (131, 135, DIR_UP);
  if (WalkedToLookedAt ("") != 0) { }
  else if (UsedAction (A_PICK_UP))
  {
    if (MovedTo ())
    {
      if (GetGlobalInt (50) > 2) DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "It's still playing!");
      else 
      {
        ObjectOff (object);
        PlaySound (4);
        AddInventory (item);
        SetGlobalInt (50, 0);
      }
    }
  }
  else Unhandled ();
}

#sectionstart object6_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function object6_b (){
  // script for object6: Any click on object
  AnyClickOntoCassette (6, 14);
}
#sectionend object6_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart object7_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function object7_b (){
  // script for object7: Any click on object
  AnyClickOntoCassette (7, 26);
}
#sectionend object7_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart object9_c  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function object9_c (){
  // script for object9: Any click on object
  SetWalkTo (325, 135, DIR_UP);
  if (WalkedToLookedAt ("I can't reach it.") != 0) { }
  else if (UsedAction (A_PICK_UP))
  {
    if (MovedTo ()) DisplaySpeech (GetPlayerCharacter (), "I can't reach it.");
  }
  else Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend object9_c  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart object10_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function object10_a (){
  // script for object10: Any click on object
  if (any_click_walk (315, 135, DIR_UP) == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend object10_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE




#sectionstart room_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function room_b() {
  // script for room: Player enters screen (after fadein)
if (GetGlobalInt(19)==2)
{
  PlayMusic(3); 
  Wait(30);
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"Hi Sandy, could you turn the music down?");
  Wait(50);
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"Sandy, the music's too loud!");
  Wait(50);
  MoveCharacterBlocking(DAVE,90,136,1);
  Wait(15);
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"SANDY, TURN OFF THE MUSIC!");
  Wait(20);
  FaceCharacter(SANDY,DAVE);
  Wait(10);
  DisplaySpeech(SANDY,"Oh!");
  Wait(15);
  MoveCharacterBlocking(SANDY,131,135,1);
  FaceLocation(SANDY,131,1);
  Wait(25);
  PlaySound(1);
  ObjectOn(4);
  ObjectOn(5);
  ObjectOn(6);
  Wait(35);
  PlaySound(94);
  SetObjectGraphic (5, 435);
  StopMusic();
  Wait(25);
  PlaySound(5);
  ObjectOff(4);
  ObjectOff(5);
  ObjectOff(6);
  Wait(25);
  FaceCharacter(SANDY,DAVE);
  Wait(15);
  DisplaySpeech(SANDY,"I'm sorry Dave, I couldn't hear you,");
  DisplaySpeech(SANDY,"the music was too loud.");
  Wait(15);
  FaceLocation(DAVE,90,200);
  Wait(15);
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"Everybody's a comedian!");
  Wait(15);
  FaceCharacter(DAVE,SANDY);
  Wait(15);
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"I was just giving a tour to all these...");
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"...future game players. Want to come?");
  DisplaySpeech(SANDY,"Sure Dave, I'll go anywhere with you!");
  Wait(15);
  // FollowCharacterEx(SANDY,DAVE,55,75);
  MoveCharacter (DAVE, 570, 136);
  Wait(30);
  MoveCharacter (SANDY, 530, 136);
  // MoveCharacterBlocking(DAVE,570,136,1);
  Wait(135);
  FaceLocation(DAVE,570,200);
  Wait(20);
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"Oh yes, in Maniac Mansion,");
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"you not only direct my actions,");
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"but the actions of two of my friends.");
  GUIOn(0);
  GUIOn(1);
  SetButtonPic (1, 13, 1, 1095);
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"You point to the verbs you see below...");
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"...to construct sentences.");
  Wait(25);
  FaceLocation(DAVE,600,136);
  Wait(15);
  PlaySound(2);
  ObjectOn(1);
  Wait(20);
  SetCharacterView(DAVE,105);
  Wait(15);
  MoveCharacterDirect(SANDY,570, 136);
  while (character[SANDY].walking) Wait(1);
  Wait(20);
  SetCharacterView(SANDY,105);
  Wait(15);
  GUIOff(0);
  GUIOff(1);
  NewRoom(5);
}
}
#sectionend room_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
